arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: Star forward likely to leave in summer window despite club being Premier League title favourites
arts.sum: Liverpool may part company with one of their forwards in the summer transfer window, but they could still leave Anfield with a Premier League winners medal.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson says the Premier League title is 'one million per cent' heading to Liverpool after Arsenal's loss to West Ham as he claims Mikel Merino played like a 'fish up a tree' in his new position
arts.sum: Liverpool will travel to Manchester City on Sunday but Merson claimed that even a 7-0 defeat for the leaders would not be enough to reignite Arsenal's hopes of winning the title.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Man City - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their Premier League clash with Man City this Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Liverpool - Premier League
arts.sum: How Man City could line up for their Premier League clash with table toppers Liverpool this Sunday.

arts.ttl: Guirassy scores 4 goals for Dortmund, first to do so since Haaland in 2020
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy became the first player since Erling Haaland to score four goals for Borussia Dortmund in a 6-0 rout of Union Berlin on Saturday in the Bundesliga. Guirassy had only scored nine in 19 league games prior to Union’s visit, far from reaching the 28 goals he scored in 28 Bundesliga appearances for Stuttgart last season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd, Liverpool and Chelsea dealt transfer setback in fight for RB Leipzig star
arts.sum: RB Leipzig centre-back Castello Lukeba is hot property and the Frenchman has a £74.5million release clause that kicks into gear in July which is of particular interest to several Premier League clubs

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk contract update: Liverpool captain speaks out on future as Arne Slot faces busy summer transfer window
arts.sum: Liverpool centre-back Virgil van Dijk speaks about his future in the buildup to his side's clash against Manchester City on Sunday in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans say £50m Premier League player would be the ideal Mohamed Salah replacement at Anfield
arts.sum: Liverpool are set for a busy summer on the transfer front after a fairly quiet 2023/24 in which only one player arrived at Anfield. Federico...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United could be offered the chance to sign out of favour Man City star
arts.sum: Newcastle United are looking to strengthen their squad in the summer transfer window. The Magpies have performed well this season but there are gaps in their squad that need to be filled at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Major Liverpool title race announcement made after Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Liverpool are currently eight points clear of Arsenal at the top of the Premier League
